category_sources: Official Cromwell documentation describes it as a workflow management system for scientific workflows.
source_facts.description says Cromwell is a workflow execution engine using Workflow Description Language.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use the display name Cromwell.
docs_sources: Official repository links to Cromwell documentation on Read the Docs.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, whose README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official documentation covers Cromwell as a workflow management system for scientific workflows.
source_facts.description identifies Workflow Description Language execution.
